# Security risk examples

<!-- source: 12-cost-security.qmd section "Lethal trifecta for prompt injection attacks" -->

A concrete walkthrough of the lethal trifecta — untrusted content, private data access, and the ability to communicate externally — and how easy it is to cross the line.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge identifying which trifecta conditions a given agent setup satisfies.
:::
